things.name: Angkor Wat
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage world's largest religious monument - the greatest temple complex ever built

things.name: Bayon Temple (Angkor Thom)
things.description: Khmer masterpiece with 216 serene stone faces gazing in all directions

things.name: Ta Prohm Temple
things.description: Jungle-choked temple where giant strangler fig tree roots engulf the stone ruins

things.name: Sunrise at Angkor Wat
things.description: The most iconic sunrise in Asia - Angkor's reflection in the moat at dawn

things.name: Banteay Srei
things.description: 10th-century temple of exquisitely detailed pink sandstone carvings - the jewel of Angkor

things.name: Pub Street & Night Market
things.description: Siem Reap's lively night scene with street food, cocktails and Cambodian arts and crafts

things.name: Tonle Sap Floating Villages
things.description: Sunset boat trip to floating villages on Asia's largest freshwater lake

things.name: Angkor National Museum
things.description: 8 galleries of Khmer history and art to understand Angkor Wat before you visit

things.name: Phare Circus
things.description: Extraordinary Cambodian circus using acrobatics to tell traditional stories

things.name: Beng Mealea
things.description: Remote jungle-engulfed temple 68km from Siem Reap - entirely unrestored and atmospheric
